shop.help.collect: /ksshop collect - Collect earnings from shop balances
shop.help.open: /ksshop open - Open your shop for business
shop.create.max_reached: You have reached the maximum number of shops ({0})!
shop.create.cooldown: You must wait {0} before creating another shop.
shop.create.name_taken: A shop with this name already exists.
shop.create.no_claim: You can only create shops on your own claimed land.
shop.create.name_required: Please provide a shop name. Usage: /ksshop create <name>
shop.create.failed: Failed to create shop. Please try again.
shop.create.name_too_short: Shop name is too short (min {0} characters).
shop.create.not_enough: You don't have enough funds to create a shop.
shop.create.block_required: You need to be standing next to a Shop Block. Place a Shop Stall block first, then run this command while standing on or next to it.
shop.create.no_block_nearby: No Shop Block found nearby. Place a Shop Stall block within 3 blocks and try again.
shop.delete.not_owner: You are not the owner of this shop.
shop.delete.confirm: Type the command again within 10 seconds to confirm deletion.
shop.edit.not_owner: You are not the owner of this shop.
shop.edit.locked: This shop is currently being edited by another player.
shop.edit.no_shop: You don't have any shops. Create one with /ksshop create <name>
shop.edit.name_invalid: Shop name contains invalid characters or is the wrong length.
shop.edit.name_taken: A shop with that name already exists.
shop.edit.save_failed: Failed to save shop changes. Please try again.
shop.open.no_items: Cannot open shop with no items.
shop.rename.name_required: Please provide a new name. Usage: /ksshop rename <name>
shop.rename.name_taken: A shop with the name '{0}' already exists.
shop.rename.invalid_length: Shop name length must be between {0} and {1} characters.
shop.buy.out_of_stock: This item is out of stock.
shop.buy.own_shop: You cannot buy from your own shop.
shop.sell.disabled: This shop does not accept buyback.
shop.sell.no_funds: This shop doesn't have enough funds to buy that item.
shop.rate.own_shop: You cannot rate your own shop.
shop.rate.cooldown: You can only rate once per {0} hours.
shop.rate.purchase_required: You must purchase from this shop before rating.
shop.myshops.empty: You don't own any shops yet.
shop.myshops.none: You don't own any shops yet. Create one with /ksshop create <name>
shop.status.opened: Shop '{0}' is now open for business!
shop.visit.id_required: Please provide a shop ID or name. Usage: /ksshop visit <shopId>
shop.transfer.target_max: {0} has reached the maximum number of shops.
shop.transfer.self: You cannot transfer a shop to yourself.
shop.notifications.disabled: Shop notifications are currently disabled on this server.
shop.error.no_permission: You don't have permission to do this.
shop.error.player_only: This command is for players only.
shop.error.database: A database error occurred. Please try again.
shop.error.editor_locked: This shop is currently being edited by another session.
shop.error.open_failed: Failed to open the shop UI. Please try again.
